meaning: n.块(尤指小块),肿块,笨人vt.使成块状,混在一起,忍耐,笨重地移动vi.结块
examples: I've got a lump on my shoulder.
She impaled a lump of meat on her fork.
The potter shaped and squeezed the lump of clay into a graceful shape.
Previously, the lower 30-year U.S. government bond rates were used to calculate lump-sum pension values.
When the interest rate used to calculate a lump sum increases, the lump sum value goes down.
